reasoning: Potassium 4,6-dinitro-o-cresolate is the potassium salt of DNOC (4,6-dinitro-2-methylphenol), where the phenolate oxygen forms a salt with potassium. As an organic salt of a phenol (phenoxide), it is best classified as an organic salt. The parent compound is a nitrophenol, but as a metal phenolate salt, the direct parent is organic salts.
